seoTitle: InventChip News | Product Announcements, Technology Updates | LiTong
seoDescription: Latest news and updates from InventChip including new product announcements, technology breakthroughs, and industry events.

faqs.question: What types of news does LiTong publish about InventChip?
faqs.answer: LiTong publishes comprehensive news about InventChip including new product announcements for SiC MOSFETs and power modules; technology updates on SiC manufacturing and device improvements; application success stories in EV, solar, and industrial markets; industry event coverage from trade shows and conferences; supply chain updates and capacity expansion news; partnership announcements with automotive and industrial OEMs; technical webinars and training events.
faqs.decisionGuide: Subscribe to our newsletter to receive the latest InventChip news and product updates.

faqs.question: How can I stay updated on InventChip product releases?
faqs.answer: Stay updated on InventChip products: (1) LiTong newsletter - Subscribe for updates. (2) News page - Check regularly. (3) Product alerts - Sign up for notifications. (4) WeChat - Follow LiTong official account. (5) FAE contact - Your local FAE provides updates. (6) Events - Attend webinars and trade shows. (7) Direct contact - Reach LiTong sales team.
faqs.decisionGuide: Subscribe to LiTong newsletter and follow WeChat for timely product updates.

faqs.question: Does LiTong host technical webinars about InventChip products?
faqs.answer: Yes, LiTong hosts regular InventChip technical webinars: (1) Product training - New device introductions. (2) Application workshops - EV, solar topics. (3) Design tutorials - Gate drive, thermal guidance. (4) Case studies - Success stories. (5) Q&A sessions - Live FAE interaction. (6) Recordings - On-demand access. (7) Language - Mandarin Chinese available. Webinars provide valuable technical knowledge.
faqs.decisionGuide: Register for upcoming webinars or access recorded sessions on demand.

news.title: InventChip Announces Major Capacity Expansion
news.summary: InventChip to double SiC wafer fab capacity to meet growing demand from EV and renewable energy markets.
content: InventChip Technology announced today a major capacity expansion at its Suzhou manufacturing facility, doubling SiC wafer production capacity to meet rapidly growing demand from electric vehicle and renewable energy markets.

The expansion includes additional epitaxial growth capacity, wafer fabrication equipment, and module assembly lines. The increased capacity will come online in phases throughout 2024 and 2025, with full ramp expected by Q2 2025.

This investment reflects InventChip's confidence in the continued growth of the SiC market and the company's commitment to supporting customer demand. The expanded capacity will primarily serve the Chinese domestic market while also supporting international customers.
LiTong customers will benefit from improved lead times and supply security. Contact your LiTong representative to discuss long-term supply agreements and capacity allocation.
news.author: LiTong Supply Chain Team

faqs.question: How will the capacity expansion affect lead times?
faqs.answer: Capacity expansion impact: (1) Lead times - Gradual improvement from Q3 2024. (2) Standard products - Better availability. (3) High volume - Priority allocation. (4) Samples - Faster delivery. (5) Forecast - Better planning. (6) Support - LiTong helps navigate. Expect gradual improvement as capacity ramps.
faqs.decisionGuide: Contact LiTong to discuss long-term agreements for priority allocation.

faqs.question: What products will benefit from the expansion?
faqs.answer: Products benefiting: (1) SiC MOSFETs - All voltage ratings. (2) Power modules - Increased capacity. (3) Automotive devices - Priority for EV market. (4) Popular parts - Better availability. (5) New products - Faster introduction. High-volume products see greatest improvement.
faqs.decisionGuide: All InventChip products benefit; automotive devices get priority.

news.title: InventChip SiC Selected by Major Chinese EV Maker
news.summary: Leading Chinese electric vehicle manufacturer selects InventChip SiC MOSFETs for new EV platform, validating automotive qualification.
content: A leading Chinese electric vehicle manufacturer has selected InventChip SiC MOSFETs for its new EV platform, marking a significant design win for the domestic SiC supplier. The platform will use InventChip devices in onboard chargers and DC-DC converters.

The selection validates InventChip's automotive qualification program, including AEC-Q101 certification and IATF 16949 quality management. The competitive pricing and local support were key factors in the decision.

The EV platform targets the mainstream passenger vehicle market, where cost-effectiveness is critical. InventChip's 20-30% cost advantage over international brands enables more competitive vehicle pricing.
LiTong is supporting this program with dedicated automotive FAE resources and local inventory. Contact LiTong to learn how InventChip SiC can benefit your EV designs.
news.author: LiTong Automotive Team

faqs.question: What InventChip devices are used in this EV platform?
faqs.answer: EV platform devices: (1) OBC - IV1D06580T3 650V devices. (2) DC-DC - Various ratings. (3) Voltage - 650V for 400V battery. (4) Automotive - AEC-Q101 qualified. (5) Cost-effective - Lower system cost. InventChip provides complete EV solution.
faqs.decisionGuide: Similar devices available for your EV designs; contact FAE for recommendations.

faqs.question: What does this design win mean for InventChip?
faqs.answer: Design win significance: (1) Validation - Automotive qualification proven. (2) Market - Major Chinese EV adoption. (3) Volume - High-volume production. (4) Confidence - Customer trust. (5) Growth - Revenue increase. (6) Future - More design wins expected. Major milestone for InventChip.
faqs.decisionGuide: Validates InventChip as qualified automotive SiC supplier.

news.title: InventChip Launches New 1200V SiC MOSFET Series
news.summary: InventChip introduces new generation of 1200V SiC MOSFETs with improved performance and cost-effectiveness for EV and industrial applications.
content: InventChip Technology announced today the launch of its new generation 1200V SiC MOSFET series, featuring improved performance and enhanced cost-effectiveness for electric vehicle and industrial applications.

The new IV1D120xxT3 series offers Rds(on) specifications from 20mΩ to 80mΩ, covering a wide range of current requirements. The devices feature improved switching characteristics and reduced switching losses compared to the previous generation.

Key improvements include optimized gate charge for easier drive requirements, enhanced ruggedness for reliable operation, and competitive pricing that maintains InventChip's 20-30% cost advantage over international competitors.
The new series is AEC-Q101 qualified and available for sampling now. Production quantities will be available in Q2 2024. Contact LiTong for samples and evaluation kits.
news.author: LiTong Technical Team

faqs.question: What are the key improvements in the new series?
faqs.answer: New series improvements: (1) Rds(on) - Lower on-resistance. (2) Switching - Faster, lower losses. (3) Gate charge - Easier to drive. (4) Ruggedness - Enhanced reliability. (5) Cost - Maintained advantage. (6) Range - Wider current options. Significant performance improvement.
faqs.decisionGuide: New generation offers better performance at same competitive pricing.

faqs.question: When will the new series be available?
faqs.answer: New series availability: (1) Sampling - Available now. (2) Evaluation kits - With samples. (3) Production - Q2 2024. (4) Qualification - AEC-Q101 complete. (5) Support - FAE assistance. Contact LiTong for samples.
faqs.decisionGuide: Samples available now; production in Q2 2024.

news.title: InventChip SiC Powers 100kW Solar Inverter
news.summary: Leading solar inverter manufacturer achieves 98.5% efficiency using InventChip SiC MOSFETs in new 100kW commercial inverter design.
content: A leading Chinese solar inverter manufacturer has achieved 98.5% peak efficiency in its new 100kW commercial string inverter using InventChip SiC MOSFETs. The design utilizes IV1D12040T3 devices in the power conversion stages.

The high efficiency was enabled by InventChip's competitive SiC technology, which delivers low switching losses at a cost-effective price point. The inverter operates at 50kHz switching frequency, enabling compact magnetics design.

The cost savings from using InventChip devices allowed the manufacturer to offer a more competitive system price while maintaining high efficiency and reliability. The inverter targets the commercial rooftop solar market.
LiTong provided technical support throughout the development, including device selection guidance and thermal design review. Contact LiTong for support on your solar inverter designs.
news.author: LiTong Renewable Energy Team

faqs.question: Which InventChip devices are used in solar inverters?
faqs.answer: Solar inverter devices: (1) MOSFETs - IV1D12040T3 for switching. (2) Voltage - 1200V for 1000V systems. (3) Efficiency - Enable 98.5% peak. (4) Cost - Competitive pricing. (5) Reliability - 25-year life. InventChip provides cost-effective SiC for solar.
faqs.decisionGuide: Use IV1D12040T3 for cost-effective high-efficiency solar inverters.

faqs.question: How does InventChip improve solar inverter competitiveness?
faqs.answer: Competitiveness improvements: (1) Device cost - 20-30% lower. (2) Efficiency - Maintained high. (3) System cost - Lower BOM. (4) Price - More competitive inverter. (5) Market - Better positioning. (6) Margin - Improved profitability. Significant competitive advantage.
faqs.decisionGuide: InventChip enables more competitive solar inverter pricing.

news.title: InventChip to Exhibit at PCIM Asia 2024
news.summary: Visit LiTong and InventChip at PCIM Asia 2024 in Shanghai to see latest SiC products and reference designs.
content: InventChip Technology and LiTong will exhibit at PCIM Asia 2024, the leading power electronics exhibition in Asia. Visit us at Hall W2, Booth 215 to see the latest SiC products and speak with our technical experts.

Highlights will include demonstrations of the new 1200V SiC MOSFET series, EV traction inverter reference designs, and solar inverter solutions. Visitors can see live switching demonstrations and efficiency measurements.

The booth will feature technical experts from both InventChip and LiTong who can discuss your specific application requirements and provide design guidance. Mandarin Chinese support will be available.
LiTong FAEs will be present to discuss your projects and provide local support information. Schedule a meeting with our team in advance or stop by the booth during exhibition hours.
news.author: LiTong Marketing Team

faqs.question: Where and when is PCIM Asia 2024?
faqs.answer: PCIM Asia 2024 details: (1) Location - Shanghai, China. (2) Dates - August 28-30, 2024. (3) Venue - Shanghai New International Expo Centre. (4) Hours - 9:00-17:00 daily. (5) InventChip booth - Hall W2, Booth 215. (6) Registration - Free online. Plan your visit.
faqs.decisionGuide: Register online and visit InventChip booth 215 in Hall W2.

faqs.question: What products will be demonstrated?
faqs.answer: Booth demonstrations: (1) 1200V SiC - New generation devices. (2) EV solutions - Traction inverter reference. (3) Solar inverters - Efficiency demos. (4) Switching demos - Live performance. (5) FAE support - Technical consultation. See live demonstrations.
faqs.decisionGuide: Visit booth for live demos and technical discussions.

news.title: InventChip Achieves IATF 16949 Certification
news.summary: InventChip successfully achieves IATF 16949 automotive quality certification, reinforcing commitment to automotive market.
content: InventChip Technology announced today the successful achievement of IATF 16949 automotive quality management system certification, a critical milestone for serving the automotive semiconductor market.

The IATF 16949 certification covers all aspects of InventChip's manufacturing operations including design, production, testing, and quality assurance for automotive applications. This certification is required by major automotive OEMs and Tier 1 suppliers.

Combined with the existing AEC-Q101 device qualification, the IATF 16949 certification demonstrates InventChip's full commitment to the automotive market. Customers can have confidence in InventChip's quality systems for automotive applications.

LiTong provides full supply chain support for automotive customers including IATF 16949 documentation, PPAP support, and long-term supply agreements. Contact LiTong for your automotive SiC requirements.
news.author: LiTong Quality Team

faqs.question: What is IATF 16949 certification?
faqs.answer: IATF 16949 certification: (1) Automotive standard - Quality management. (2) Based on ISO 9001 - With automotive requirements. (3) Required - By major OEMs. (4) Scope - Design, production, testing. (5) Importance - Essential for automotive suppliers. Critical certification for automotive market.
faqs.decisionGuide: IATF 16949 is essential for automotive semiconductor suppliers.

faqs.question: What does this certification mean for customers?
faqs.answer: Certification benefits: (1) Quality assurance - Certified processes. (2) OEM approval - Meets requirements. (3) PPAP support - Full production approval. (4) Reliability - Automotive grade. (5) Confidence - Proven quality system. Full automotive qualification.
faqs.decisionGuide: Customers can have full confidence in InventChip automotive quality.
